19// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
20// Helper: read XYZ positions from a text file (one triplet per line)
21// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
32std::vector<rvec> readPositionsFromFile(const std::string& filename) {
33 std::vector<rvec> positions;
34 std::ifstream file(filename);
35
36 if (!file.is_open()) {
37 throw std::runtime_error("Could not open file: " + filename);
38 }
39
40 std::string line;
41 while (std::getline(file, line)) {
42 std::istringstream iss(line);
43 double x, y, z;
44 if (iss >> x >> y >> z) {
45 positions.emplace_back(x, y, z);
46 }
47 }
48
49 file.close();
50 return positions;
51}
52
53// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
54// Construction & lifetime
55// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
56DomainLayered3D::DomainLayered3D(SurfaceMesh *inMesh, int inDIndex,
57 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilon,
58 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMu,
59 const std::vector<double>& inZVals,
60 dcmplx inVacuumWavelength)
61 : Domain(inMesh, inDIndex, inVacuumWavelength),
62 epsilon(inEpsilon),
63 mu(inMu),
64 zValsInterfaces(inZVals),
65 grnFunLayered(nullptr),
66 grnFunLayeredFields(nullptr) {
67 // Derive layer thicknesses from interface positions
68 thickness.resize(zValsInterfaces.size() - 1);
69 for (size_t i = 1; i < zValsInterfaces.size(); ++i) {
70 thickness[i - 1] = zValsInterfaces[i] - zValsInterfaces[i - 1];
71 }
72
73 // Collect triangle sample points for grid sizing (Dunavant rule per triangle)
74 for (size_t i = 0; i < rwgFuns.size(); i++) {
75 rvec r[3];
76 for (int j = 0; j < 3; j++) { r[j] = rwgFuns[i].TrianglePtr()->Node(j); }
77 int Ndunavant; double(*xdunavant)[3];
78 Ndunavant = NeedsAccurate ? dunavant::N17 : dunavant::N1;
79 xdunavant = NeedsAccurate ? dunavant::x17 : dunavant::x1;
80 for (int k = 0; k < Ndunavant; ++k) {
81 triPoints.push_back(r[0] * xdunavant[k][0] + r[1] * xdunavant[k][1] +
82 r[2] * xdunavant[k][2]);
83 }
84 // Add the triangle vertices to triPoints
85 //triPoints.push_back(r[0]);
86 //triPoints.push_back(r[1]);
87 //triPoints.push_back(r[2]);
88 }
89
90 // Slice & grid for tabulation
91 auto pointGroups = slice(triPoints, &triPoints);
92 tabulationGrids = computeGrid(pointGroups);
93
94 // Decide if line‑integral terms are needed (interfaces cutting the mesh extent)
95 enableLineInt = false;
96 std::pair<double, double> zMinMax = inMesh->zMinMax();
97 for (size_t i = 0; i < zValsInterfaces.size(); ++i) {
98 if (zMinMax.first < zValsInterfaces[i] - 1e-10 &&
99 zMinMax.second > zValsInterfaces[i] + 1e-10) {
100 enableLineInt = true;
101 break;
102 }
103 }
104
105 // Calculate midLayerIndex based on mesh bounds
106 double zMid = (zMinMax.first + zMinMax.second) * 0.5;
107 // Use logic similar to basic GetLayerIndex but without interface ambiguity for mid-point
108 midLayerIndex = -1;
109 if (zMid < zValsInterfaces.front()) midLayerIndex = 0;
110 else if (zMid > zValsInterfaces.back()) midLayerIndex = zValsInterfaces.size();
111 else {
112 for(size_t i = 0; i < zValsInterfaces.size() - 1; ++i) {
113 if(zMid >= zValsInterfaces[i] && zMid < zValsInterfaces[i + 1]) {
114 midLayerIndex = i + 1; break;
115 }
116 }
117 }
118 if (midLayerIndex == -1) midLayerIndex = 0; // Fallback
119
120 // Build Green's functions and helpers
121 InitGrnFun();
122 k_L = grnFunLayered->GetLayersWavenumbers();
123 layeredUtils = new LayeredMediaUtils(k_L, epsilon, mu, zValsInterfaces, thickness, midLayerIndex);
124}
125
126DomainLayered3D::DomainLayered3D(SurfaceMesh *inMesh, int inDIndex,
127 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inEpsilon,
128 const std::vector<dcmplx>& inMu,
129 const std::vector<double>& inZVals,
130 dcmplx inVacuumWavelength, bool parent)
131 : Domain(inMesh, inDIndex, inVacuumWavelength),
132 epsilon(inEpsilon),
133 mu(inMu),
134 zValsInterfaces(inZVals),
135 grnFunLayered(nullptr),
136 grnFunLayeredFields(nullptr) {
137 if (!parent) InitGrnFun();
138}
139
143DomainLayered3D::~DomainLayered3D() {
144 delete[] grnFun; // per‑layer homogeneous GFs
145 delete grnFunLayered; // layered GF
146 delete grnFunLayeredFields; // layered GF for fields
147 delete layeredUtils; // layered media utilities
148}
149
150
151// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
152// Green's functions and formulation
153// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
154int DomainLayered3D::InitGrnFun() {
155 // One homogeneous GF per layer (intra‑layer pieces)
156 grnFun = new GreenFHom3D[zValsInterfaces.size() + 1];
157 for (size_t i = 0; i < zValsInterfaces.size() + 1; ++i) {
158 grnFun[i] = GreenFHom3D(vacuumWavelength, epsilon[i], mu[i]);
159 }
160
161 // Layered GF (Sommerfeld integral with tabulation)
162 grnFunLayered = new GreenFLayered3D(vacuumWavelength, epsilon, mu,
163 zValsInterfaces, thickness,
164 tabulationGrids, enableLineInt,
165 midLayerIndex);
166 return 0;
167}
168
169void DomainLayered3D::newGrnFunLayered(std::vector<rvec> &posvec) {
170 // Keep only observation points inside this domain
171 std::vector<rvec> obsPoints;
172 for (size_t i = 0; i < posvec.size(); i++) {
173 if ( this->IsInside(posvec[i]) ) obsPoints.push_back(posvec[i]);
174 }
175
176 // Build grids tailored to these points and create a fresh layered GF for fields
177 auto pointGroups = slice(obsPoints, &triPoints);
178 tabulationGridsFields = computeGrid(pointGroups);
179 grnFunLayeredFields =
180 new GreenFLayered3D(vacuumWavelength, epsilon, mu,
181 zValsInterfaces, thickness,
182 tabulationGridsFields, false, midLayerIndex);
183
184 // If there are dipoles, wire each to its own evaluation GF with a grid that
185 // includes the dipole location (to avoid interpolation artifacts near source)
186 for (std::vector<IncidentField *>::iterator incIter = incidentFields.begin();
187 incIter != incidentFields.end(); incIter++) {
188 if ( (*incIter)->IsDipole() ) {
189 Dipole* dipPtr = dynamic_cast<Dipole*>(*incIter);
190 if (dipPtr) {
191 std::vector<rvec> dipPoint = { dipPtr->Location() };
192 auto fieldPointGroups = slice(obsPoints, &dipPoint);
193 std::vector<Grid> tabGridFields = computeGrid(fieldPointGroups);
194 GreenF* fGrnFields =
195 new GreenFLayered3D(vacuumWavelength, epsilon, mu,
196 zValsInterfaces, thickness, tabGridFields,
197 false, midLayerIndex);
198 dipPtr->setGrnFunLayered(fGrnFields, tabGridFields);
199 }
200 else {
201 std::cerr << "Error: Dynamic cast to Dipole failed." << std::endl;
202 }
203 }
204 }
205}
206
207int DomainLayered3D::InitFormulation(dcmplx inVacWavelength) {
208 formulation = new SIEFormPMCHW(&rwgFuns, grnFun, &incidentFields, inVacWavelength,
209 grnFunLayered, epsilon, mu, zValsInterfaces,
210 midLayerIndex);
211 return 0;
212}
213
214// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
215// Layer indexing
216// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
217int DomainLayered3D::GetLayerIndex(rvec pos) const {
218 double z = pos[2]; // Extract the z-component of the position
219 int index = -1;
220 const double eps = 1e-6; // Small tolerance for floating-point comparisons
221
222 // Check if point is on an interface
223 for (size_t i = 0; i < zValsInterfaces.size(); ++i) {
224 if (std::abs(z - zValsInterfaces[i]) <= eps) {
225 // Interface i separates layer i and layer i+1
226 int l_lower = i;
227 int l_upper = i + 1;
228 index = std::abs(l_lower - midLayerIndex) < std::abs(l_upper - midLayerIndex)
229 ? l_lower : l_upper; break;
230 }
231 }
232
233 for (size_t i = 0; i < zValsInterfaces.size() - 1; ++i) {
234 if (z > zValsInterfaces[i] + eps && z < zValsInterfaces[i + 1] - eps) {
235 index = i + 1; break;
236 }
237 }
238
239 // If z is beyond the last interface, return the index of the last layer
240 if (z > zValsInterfaces.back() + eps) {
241 index = zValsInterfaces.size();
242 }
243
244 // If z is below the first interface, return the index of the first layer
245 if (z < zValsInterfaces.front() - eps) {
246 index = 0;
247 }
248
249 return index;
250}

260std::vector<std::vector<dcmplx>> DomainLayered3D::InterfaceTransferMatrix(
261 int layerIndexI, int layerIndexJ, dcmplx krho, const std::string& waves) const {
262 return this->layeredUtils->InterfaceTransferMatrix(layerIndexI, layerIndexJ, krho, waves);
263}

265/* External LAPACK functions for solving linear systems. These functions
266 * are used for LU factorization (`zgetrf_`) and solving linear
267 * equations using the LU decomposition (`zgetrs_`).
268 */
269extern "C" {
280 void zgetrf_(int *dim1, int *dim2, dcmplx *a, int *lda, int *ipiv, int *info);
281
295 void zgetrs_(char *TRANS, int *N, int *NRHS, dcmplx *A, int *LDA, int *IPIV,
296 dcmplx *B, int *LDB, int *INFO);
297}
298
299blitz::Array<dcmplx, 2> DomainLayered3D::Secondary(dcmplx krho, int observationLayer,
300 int sourceLayer, const std::string& waves) {
301 return this->layeredUtils->Secondary(krho, observationLayer, sourceLayer, waves);
302}
303
304std::vector<dcmplx> DomainLayered3D::Fields(dcmplx krho, std::vector<double> observationPointsZ,
305 double sourcePointZ, const std::string& waves) {
306 return this->layeredUtils->Fields(krho, observationPointsZ, sourcePointZ, waves);
307}
308
309int DomainLayered3D::writeFields(dcmplx krho, double start, double end, int numPoints,
310 double sourcePointZ, const std::string& waves) {
311 std::vector<double> zPoints(numPoints);
312 double step = (end - start) / (numPoints - 1);
313 for (int i = 0; i < numPoints; ++i) {
314 zPoints[i] = start + i * step;
315 }
316
317 // Compute the fields for all points
318 std::vector<dcmplx> fields = Fields(krho, zPoints, sourcePointZ, waves);
319
320 // Construct file name with waves information
321 std::string fileName = "FieldsOutput_" + waves + ".txt";
322
323 // Open a file to write the results
324 std::ofstream outFile(fileName);
325 if (!outFile) {
326 std::cerr << "Error: Could not open file for writing." << std::endl;
327 return 1;
328 }
329
330 // Write header for MATLAB readability
331 outFile << "% z RealPart ImagPart\n";
332
333 // Write the Fields results to the file
334 for (int i = 0; i < zPoints.size(); ++i) {
335 outFile << zPoints[i] << " " << std::real(fields[i]) << " " << std::imag(fields[i]) << "\n";
336 }
337 outFile.close();
338 std::cout << "Fields data written to " << fileName << std::endl;
339
340 return 0;
341}

343// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
344// Material queries
345// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
346dcmplx DomainLayered3D::Epsilon(rvec pos) { return epsilon[GetLayerIndex(pos)]; }
347
348dcmplx DomainLayered3D::Mu(rvec pos) { return mu[GetLayerIndex(pos)]; }

350// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
351// Incident fields (layered variants)
352// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
353int DomainLayered3D::AddPlaneWave(dcmplx /*wavelength*/, rvec propagationDirection,
354 cvec polarization) {
355 IncidentField *ptr = new PlaneWave(k_L, epsilon, mu, zValsInterfaces, thickness,
356 propagationDirection, polarization);
357 incidentFields.push_back(ptr);
358 return 0;
359}
360
361int DomainLayered3D::AddDipole(rvec location, cvec polarization) {
362 std::vector<rvec> locPoints = { location };
363 auto tempPointGroups = slice(triPoints, &locPoints);
364 std::vector<Grid> tempTabulationGrids = computeGrid(tempPointGroups);
365 GreenF* tempGrnFunHom =
366 new GreenFHom3D(vacuumWavelength, Epsilon(location), Mu(location));
367 GreenF* tempGrnFunLayered =
368 new GreenFLayered3D(vacuumWavelength, epsilon, mu,
369 zValsInterfaces, thickness, tempTabulationGrids,
370 false, midLayerIndex);
371 LayeredMediaUtils* tempLayeredUtils =
372 new LayeredMediaUtils(k_L, epsilon, mu, zValsInterfaces,
373 thickness, midLayerIndex);
374 IncidentField *ptr =
375 new Dipole(location, polarization, vacuumWavelength, tempGrnFunHom,
376 Mu(location), tempTabulationGrids, tempGrnFunLayered,
377 tempLayeredUtils);
378 incidentFields.push_back(ptr);
379 return 0;
380}

383int DomainLayered3D::AddGaussian(double wavelength, double waist, rvec focal_point,
384 rvec propagationDirection, cvec polarization) {
385 IncidentField *ptr =
386 new Gaussian(wavelength, waist, focal_point, real(epsilon[0]), // TEMPORARY CHANGE
387 propagationDirection, polarization);
388 incidentFields.push_back(ptr);
389 return 0;
390}
391
392// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
393// Tabulation utilities (slice / ranges / grids)
394// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
400std::vector<PositionGroup> DomainLayered3D::slice(const std::vector<rvec>& pos1,
401 std::vector<rvec>* pos2_opt) {
402 std::vector<PositionGroup> result;
403
404 if (pos2_opt == nullptr) {
405 // Single set: group by layer index of pos1
406 const auto& pos = pos1;
407 std::map<int, PositionGroup> groups;
408 for (size_t i = 0; i < pos.size(); ++i) {
409 int layer_index = this->GetLayerIndex(pos[i]);
410 if (groups.find(layer_index) == groups.end()) {
411 groups[layer_index] = PositionGroup{static_cast<size_t>(layer_index), 0, {}, {}, {}, {}};
412 }
413 groups[layer_index].pos1.push_back(pos[i]);
414 groups[layer_index].ind1.push_back(i);
415 }
416 for (std::map<int, PositionGroup>::iterator it = groups.begin(); it != groups.end(); ++it) {
417 result.push_back(it->second);
418 }
419 } else {
420 // Two sets of positions
421 auto& pos2 = *pos2_opt;
422 if (pos2.size() == 1) { // add three small displacements to avoid degeneracy
423 pos2.push_back(pos2[0] + rvec(5e-4, 0.0, 0.0));
424 pos2.push_back(pos2[0] + rvec(0.0, 5e-4, 0.0));
425 pos2.push_back(pos2[0] + rvec(0.0, 0.0, 5e-4));
426 }
427
428 // Precompute unique layer indices for pos1 and pos2
429 std::map<int, std::vector<size_t>> layer_map1, layer_map2;
430 for (size_t i = 0; i < pos1.size(); ++i) {
431 int layer_index = this->GetLayerIndex(pos1[i]);
432 layer_map1[layer_index].push_back(i);
433 }
434 for (size_t j = 0; j < pos2.size(); ++j) {
435 int layer_index = this->GetLayerIndex(pos2[j]);
436 layer_map2[layer_index].push_back(j);
437 }
438
439 // Loop over unique layer indices and group positions
440 for (const auto& layer1 : layer_map1) {
441 int k1 = layer1.first;
442 for (const auto& layer2 : layer_map2) {
443 int k2 = layer2.first;
444 const auto& indices1 = layer1.second;
445 const auto& indices2 = layer2.second;
446
447 PositionGroup group;
448 group.i1 = k1;
449 group.i2 = k2;
450
451 // Group positions from pos1
452 for (size_t i : indices1) {
453 group.pos1.push_back(pos1[i]);
454 group.ind1.push_back(i);
455 }
456
457 // Group positions from pos2
458 for (size_t j : indices2) {
459 group.pos2.push_back(pos2[j]);
460 group.ind2.push_back(j);
461 }
462 result.push_back(group);
463 }
464 }
465 }
466 return result;
467}
468
481std::vector<double> adjustZRange(const std::vector<double>& z,
482 const std::vector<double>& zlayer,
483 double zmin, double margin) {
484 double dz = margin * (z[1] - z[0]);
485 return {
486 std::max(z[0] - dz, zlayer[0] + zmin),
487 std::min(z[1] + dz, zlayer[1] - zmin)
488 };
489}
490
497Range DomainLayered3D::calculateRange(const PositionGroup& pts, double rmin,
498 double zmin, double margin) {
499 Range range;
500 range.i1 = pts.i1;
501 range.i2 = pts.i2;
502
503 // Compute radial distance range
504 double dmin = std::numeric_limits<double>::max();
505 double dmax = std::numeric_limits<double>::lowest();
506 for (const auto& p1 : pts.pos1) {
507 for (const auto& p2 : pts.pos2) {
508 double dx = p1[0] - p2[0];
509 double dy = p1[1] - p2[1];
510 double distance = std::sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
511 dmin = std::min(dmin, distance);
512 dmax = std::max(dmax, distance);
513 }
514 }
515 if (pts.ind2.size() == 1) {
516 // Points in the same layer
517 range.r = {dmin - rmin, dmin + rmin};
518 } else {
519 // Points in different layers
520 range.r = {std::max(dmin, rmin), (1.0 + margin) * dmax};
521 }
522
523 // Compute z-ranges
524 std::vector<double> z1 = {std::numeric_limits<double>::max(),
525 std::numeric_limits<double>::lowest()};
526 std::vector<double> z2 = z1;
527
528 for (const auto& p1 : pts.pos1) {
529 z1[0] = std::min(z1[0], p1[2]);
530 z1[1] = std::max(z1[1], p1[2]);
531 }
532
533 for (const auto& p2 : pts.pos2) {
534 z2[0] = std::min(z2[0], p2[2]);
535 z2[1] = std::max(z2[1], p2[2]);
536 }
537
538 if (z1[0] == z1[1]) z1[1] += zmin;
539 if (z2[0] == z2[1]) z2[1] += zmin;
540
541 if (range.i1 == range.i2) {
542 // Points in the same layer
543 if (range.i1 == 0) {
544 // Lowest layer
545 std::vector<double> zlim = {
546 2 * this->zValsInterfaces[0] - (z1[1] + z2[1]),
547 2 * this->zValsInterfaces[0] - (z1[0] + z2[0])
548 };
549 range.z1 = adjustZRange(zlim, {0, 1e30}, zmin, 2 * margin);
550 range.z2.clear();
551 } else if (range.i1 == this->zValsInterfaces.size()) {
552 // Highest layer
553 std::vector<double> zlim = {
554 (z1[0] + z2[0]) - 2 * this->zValsInterfaces.back(),
555 (z1[1] + z2[1]) - 2 * this->zValsInterfaces.back()
556 };
557 range.z1 = adjustZRange(zlim, {0, 1e30}, zmin, 2 * margin);
558 range.z2.clear();
559 } else {
560 // Inside the layer structure
561 z1 = adjustZRange(z1, {this->zValsInterfaces[range.i1 - 1], this->zValsInterfaces[range.i1]}, zmin, 2 * margin);
562 z2 = adjustZRange(z2, {this->zValsInterfaces[range.i1 - 1], this->zValsInterfaces[range.i1]}, zmin, 2 * margin);
563
564 range.z1 = {
565 z1[0] - z2[1] + (this->zValsInterfaces[range.i1] - this->zValsInterfaces[range.i1 - 1]),
566 z1[1] - z2[0] + (this->zValsInterfaces[range.i1] - this->zValsInterfaces[range.i1 - 1])
567 };
568 range.z2 = {
569 z1[0] + z2[0] - 2 * this->zValsInterfaces[range.i1 - 1],
570 z1[1] + z2[1] - 2 * this->zValsInterfaces[range.i1 - 1]
571 };
572 }
573 }
574 else {
575 // Points in different layers
576 std::vector<double> zTemp = {-1e30};
577 zTemp.insert(zTemp.end(), this->zValsInterfaces.begin(), this->zValsInterfaces.end());
578 zTemp.push_back(1e30);
579 range.z1 = adjustZRange(z1, {zTemp[range.i1], zTemp[range.i1 + 1]}, zmin, 2 * margin);
580 range.z2 = adjustZRange(z2, {zTemp[range.i2], zTemp[range.i2 + 1]}, zmin, 2 * margin);
581 }
582 return range;
583}
584
590std::vector<Grid> DomainLayered3D::computeGrid(const std::vector<PositionGroup>& pos,
591 int nr, int nz, double rmin,
592 double margin, double zmin) {
593 std::vector<Grid> grids;
594
595 // Compute ranges for all position groups
596 for (const auto& group : pos) {
597 Range range = calculateRange(group, rmin, zmin, margin);
598 Grid grid;
599 grid.i1 = range.i1;
600 grid.i2 = range.i2;
601 int nr_ = nr, nz_ = nz;
602 if (!range.z2.empty()) { nr_ = nr / 2; nz_ = nz / 2; }
603
604 // Compute radial grid
605 double r_start = range.r[0];
606 double r_end = range.r[1];
607 grid.r.resize(nr_);
608 for (int i = 0; i < nr_; ++i) {
609 grid.r[i] = r_start + i * (r_end - r_start) / (nr_ - 1);
610 }
611
612 // Compute Z1 grid
613 double z1_start = range.z1[0];
614 double z1_end = range.z1[1];
615 grid.z1.resize(nz_);
616 for (int i = 0; i < nz_; ++i) {
617 grid.z1[i] = z1_start + i * (z1_end - z1_start) / (nz_ - 1);
618 }
619
620 // Compute Z2 grid if it exists
621 if (!range.z2.empty()) {
622 double z2_start = range.z2[0];
623 double z2_end = range.z2[1];
624 grid.z2.resize(nz_);
625 for (int i = 0; i < nz_; ++i) {
626 grid.z2[i] = z2_start + i * (z2_end - z2_start) / (nz_ - 1);
627 }
628 } else {
629 grid.z2.clear();
630 }
631
632 grids.push_back(grid);
633 }
634
635 return grids;
636}
637
638// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
639// Fields and cross sections (layered post‑processing)
640// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
641cvec DomainLayered3D::SecFieldE(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector, rvec pos) {
642 cvec result(0, 0, 0);
643 int offset(solVector->shape()(0) / 2);
644 using std::vector;
645 using std::pair;
646 vector<RWGFun>::iterator rwgM, rwgN;
647
648 // Partition the RWG functions to groups over same triangle
649 vector<RWGFun *> rwgPerTri;
650 for (rwgM = rwgFuns.begin(); rwgM != rwgFuns.end(); rwgM = rwgN) {
651 rwgPerTri.clear();
652 for (rwgN = rwgM;
653 rwgN != rwgFuns.end() and rwgN->TrianglePtr() == rwgM->TrianglePtr();
654 rwgN++) {
655 rwgPerTri.push_back(&(*rwgN));
656 }
657 vector<pair<cvec, cvec> > DeltaKappaHom(
658 rwgPerTri.size(), make_pair(cvec(0., 0., 0.), cvec(0., 0., 0.)));
659
660 vector<pair<cvec, cvec> > DeltaKappaE(
661 rwgPerTri.size(), make_pair(cvec(0., 0., 0.), cvec(0., 0., 0.)));
662
663 rvec jCenter = rwgPerTri[0]->TrianglePtr()->Center();
664 if (GetLayerIndex(pos) == GetLayerIndex(jCenter)) {
665 grnFun[GetLayerIndex(pos)].SameTriDeltaKappa(pos, rwgPerTri, DeltaKappaHom);
666 }
667 grnFunLayeredFields->SameTriDeltaKappa(pos, rwgPerTri, DeltaKappaE);
668
669 for (int i = 0; i < (int)rwgPerTri.size(); ++i) {
670 result -= I * omega * MU0 * Mu(jCenter) *
671 (DeltaKappaHom[i].first + DeltaKappaE[i].first) *
672 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex()) +
673 (DeltaKappaHom[i].second + DeltaKappaE[i].second) *
674 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex() + offset);
675 }
676 }
677 return result;
678}
679
680cvec DomainLayered3D::IncFieldE(rvec pos) {
681 cvec incField(0, 0, 0);
682 for (std::vector<IncidentField *>::iterator incIter = incidentFields.begin();
683 incIter != incidentFields.end(); incIter++) {
684 std::vector<cvec> incFieldVec = (*incIter)->EvaluateLayeredEandH(pos);
685 incField += incFieldVec[0]; // The first element is E field
686 }
687 return incField;
688}
689
690cvec DomainLayered3D::SecFieldH(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector, rvec pos) {
691 cvec result(0, 0, 0);
692 int offset(solVector->shape()(0) / 2);
693 using std::vector;
694 using std::pair;
695 vector<RWGFun>::iterator rwgM, rwgN;
696
697 // Partition the RWG functions to groups over same triangle
698 vector<RWGFun *> rwgPerTri;
699 for (rwgM = rwgFuns.begin(); rwgM != rwgFuns.end(); rwgM = rwgN) {
700 rwgPerTri.clear();
701 for (rwgN = rwgM;
702 rwgN != rwgFuns.end() and rwgN->TrianglePtr() == rwgM->TrianglePtr();
703 rwgN++) {
704 rwgPerTri.push_back(&(*rwgN));
705 }
706 vector<pair<cvec, cvec> > DeltaKappaHom(
707 rwgPerTri.size(), make_pair(cvec(0., 0., 0.), cvec(0., 0., 0.)));
708
709 vector<pair<cvec, cvec> > DeltaKappaH(
710 rwgPerTri.size(), make_pair(cvec(1., 0., 0.), cvec(0., 0., 0.)));
711
712 rvec jCenter = rwgPerTri[0]->TrianglePtr()->Center();
713 if (GetLayerIndex(pos) == GetLayerIndex(jCenter)) {
714 grnFun[GetLayerIndex(pos)].SameTriDeltaKappa(pos, rwgPerTri, DeltaKappaHom);
715 }
716 grnFunLayeredFields->SameTriDeltaKappa(pos, rwgPerTri, DeltaKappaH);
717
718 for (int i = 0; i < (int)rwgPerTri.size(); ++i) {
719 result -= I * omega * EPS0 * Epsilon(jCenter) *
720 (DeltaKappaHom[i].first + DeltaKappaH[i].first) *
721 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex() + offset) -
722 (DeltaKappaHom[i].second + DeltaKappaH[i].second) *
723 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex());
724 }
725 }
726 return result;
727}
728
729std::pair<cvec, cvec> DomainLayered3D::SecFieldEandH(blitz::Array<dcmplx, 1> *solVector,
730 rvec pos) {
731 std::pair<cvec, cvec> result(make_pair(cvec(0, 0, 0), cvec(0, 0, 0)));
732 int offset(solVector->shape()(0) / 2);
733 using std::vector;
734 using std::pair;
735 vector<RWGFun>::iterator rwgM, rwgN;
736
737 // Partition the RWG functions to groups over same triangle
738 vector<RWGFun *> rwgPerTri;
739 for (rwgM = rwgFuns.begin(); rwgM != rwgFuns.end(); rwgM = rwgN) {
740 rwgPerTri.clear();
741 for (rwgN = rwgM;
742 rwgN != rwgFuns.end() and rwgN->TrianglePtr() == rwgM->TrianglePtr();
743 rwgN++) {
744 rwgPerTri.push_back(&(*rwgN));
745 }
746 vector<pair<cvec, cvec> > DeltaKappaHom(
747 rwgPerTri.size(), make_pair(cvec(0., 0., 0.), cvec(0., 0., 0.)));
748
749 vector<pair<cvec, cvec> > DeltaKappaE(
750 rwgPerTri.size(), make_pair(cvec(0., 0., 0.), cvec(0., 0., 0.)));
751
752 vector<pair<cvec, cvec> > DeltaKappaH(
753 rwgPerTri.size(), make_pair(cvec(1., 0., 0.), cvec(0., 0., 0.)));
754
755 rvec jCenter = rwgPerTri[0]->TrianglePtr()->Center();
756 if (GetLayerIndex(pos) == GetLayerIndex(jCenter)) {
757 grnFun[GetLayerIndex(pos)].SameTriDeltaKappa(pos, rwgPerTri, DeltaKappaHom);
758 }
759 grnFunLayeredFields->SameTriDeltaKappa(pos, rwgPerTri, DeltaKappaE);
760 grnFunLayeredFields->SameTriDeltaKappa(pos, rwgPerTri, DeltaKappaH);
761
762 for (int i = 0; i < (int)rwgPerTri.size(); ++i) {
763 result.first -= I * omega * MU0 * Mu(jCenter) *
764 (DeltaKappaHom[i].first + DeltaKappaE[i].first) *
765 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex()) +
766 (DeltaKappaHom[i].second + DeltaKappaE[i].second) *
767 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex() + offset);
768 result.second -= I * omega * EPS0 * Epsilon(jCenter) *
769 (DeltaKappaHom[i].first + DeltaKappaH[i].first) *
770 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex() + offset) -
771 (DeltaKappaHom[i].second + DeltaKappaH[i].second) *
772 (*solVector)(rwgPerTri[i]->EdgeIndex());
773 }
774 }
775#ifdef DEBUG
776 dumpField("Efield", result.first);
777 dumpField("Hfield", result.second);
778#endif
779 return result;
780}
781
782cvec DomainLayered3D::IncFieldH(rvec pos) {
783 cvec incField(0, 0, 0);
784 for (std::vector<IncidentField *>::iterator incIter = incidentFields.begin();
785 incIter != incidentFields.end(); incIter++) {
786 std::vector<cvec> incFieldVec = (*incIter)->EvaluateLayeredEandH(pos);
787 incField += incFieldVec[1]; // The second element is H field
788 }
789 return incField;
790}
791
797cvec conjVecL(cvec in) { return cvec(conj(in(0)), conj(in(1)), conj(in(2))); }
798
804rvec realVecL(cvec in) { return rvec(real(in(0)), real(in(1)), real(in(2))); }
805
806std::vector<double> DomainLayered3D::scatteringCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx,1>* solVector)
807{
808 // Gather unique triangles & normals
809 std::vector<Triangle*> vTri;
810 std::vector<rvec> vNormals;
811 vTri.reserve(rwgFuns.size());
812 vNormals.reserve(rwgFuns.size());
813
814 for (RWGFun& rwg : rwgFuns) {
815 Triangle* T = rwg.TrianglePtr();
816 auto it = std::find(vTri.begin(), vTri.end(), T);
817 if (it == vTri.end()) {
818 vTri.push_back(T);
819 vNormals.push_back(T->FBNormalVector(rwg.Side()));
820 }
821 }
822
823 size_t Ntri = vTri.size(); // number of unique triangles
824
825 // Quadrature rule on reference triangle
826 int nQuad = dunavant::N5; // number of quadrature points
827 auto& xQuad = dunavant::x5; // barycentrics [nQuad][3]
828 auto& wQuad = dunavant::w5; // weights[nQuad]
829
830 // Allocate per-triangle, per-quad-point accumulators
831 std::vector<std::vector<cvec>> Etot(Ntri, std::vector<cvec>(nQuad, cvec(0, 0, 0))),
832 Htot(Ntri, std::vector<cvec>(nQuad, cvec(0, 0, 0)));
833
834 int offset = solVector->shape()(0) / 2; // offset for β coefficients
835
836 // Fill E, H normal and tangential components at each sample point
837 for (RWGFun& rwg : rwgFuns) {
838 // find which triangle index
839 Triangle* T = rwg.TrianglePtr();
840 size_t triIndex = std::distance(vTri.begin(),
841 std::find(vTri.begin(), vTri.end(), T));
842 rvec normal = vNormals[triIndex];
843
844 // material parameters (step off interface if needed)
845 rvec ctr = T->Center();
846 bool onInt = false;
847 for (double z0 : zValsInterfaces)
848 if (std::abs( ctr[2] - z0 ) < 1e-6) { onInt = true; break; }
849
850 // element local material parameters
851 dcmplx epsLoc = onInt ? Epsilon(ctr + 1e-1 * normal) : Epsilon(ctr);
852 dcmplx muLoc = onInt ? Mu(ctr + 1e-1 * normal) : Mu(ctr);
853
854 // RWG coefficients
855 dcmplx alpha = (*solVector)(rwg.EdgeIndex());
856 dcmplx beta = (*solVector)(rwg.EdgeIndex() + offset);
857 double divf = rwg.RWGPreFactor();
858
859 // triangle nodes
860 rvec r[3] = { T->Node(0), T->Node(1), T->Node(2) };
861
862 // loop quad points
863 for (int q = 0; q < nQuad; ++q) {
864 // physical sample point
865 rvec s = xQuad[q][0] * r[0] + xQuad[q][1] * r[1] + xQuad[q][2] * r[2];
866
867 // shape‐function at s
868 rvec fval = rwg.Evaluate(s);
869
870 // normal‐component (constant over tri)
871 cvec En_contrib = -I * alpha * divf * normal / (omega * epsLoc * EPS0);
872 cvec Hn_contrib = -I * beta * divf * normal / (omega * muLoc * MU0);
873
874 // tangential‐component
875 cvec Et_contrib = cross( (cvec)normal, (cvec)(beta * fval));
876 cvec Ht_contrib = -cross( (cvec)normal, (cvec)(alpha * fval));
877
878 // J,M currents have contributions from each RWG with opposite sign, thus -=
879 Etot[triIndex][q] -= En_contrib + Et_contrib;
880 Htot[triIndex][q] -= Hn_contrib + Ht_contrib;
881 }
882 }
883
884 // Quadrature - find the scattering cross section
885 double sigma = 0.0;
886 double near = 0.0;
887 for (size_t t = 0; t < Ntri; ++t) {
888 rvec normal = vNormals[t];
889 double area = vTri[t]->Area();
890
891 // re-compute nodes for this triangle
892 rvec r[3] = { vTri[t]->Node(0), vTri[t]->Node(1), vTri[t]->Node(2) };
893
894 for (int q = 0; q < nQuad; ++q) {
895 // map barycentrics -> point
896 rvec s = xQuad[q][0] * r[0] + xQuad[q][1] * r[1] + xQuad[q][2] * r[2];
897
898 cvec Einc = IncFieldE(s);
899 cvec Hinc = IncFieldH(s);
900 rvec Sinc = realVecL( cross(Einc, conjVecL(Hinc)) ) / 2.0;
901
902 cvec Escat = Etot[t][q] - Einc;
903 cvec Hscat = Htot[t][q] - Hinc;
904 rvec Sscat = realVecL( cross(Escat, conjVecL(Hscat)) ) / 2.0;
905
906 sigma += wQuad[q] * area * dot(normal, Sscat) / sqrt( dot( Sinc, Sinc ) );
907 near += real( wQuad[q] * area * dot( Escat, conjVecL(Escat) ) );
908 }
909 }
910 return { sigma, near };
911}
912
913double DomainLayered3D::absorptionCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx,1>* solVector)
914{
915 // Gather unique triangles & normals
916 std::vector<Triangle*> vTri;
917 std::vector<rvec> vNormals;
918 vTri.reserve(rwgFuns.size());
919 vNormals.reserve(rwgFuns.size());
920
921 for (RWGFun& rwg : rwgFuns) {
922 Triangle* T = rwg.TrianglePtr();
923 auto it = std::find(vTri.begin(), vTri.end(), T);
924 if (it == vTri.end()) {
925 vTri.push_back(T);
926 vNormals.push_back(T->FBNormalVector(rwg.Side()));
927 }
928 }
929
930 size_t Ntri = vTri.size(); // number of unique triangles
931
932 // Quadrature rule on reference triangle
933 int nQuad = dunavant::N5; // number of quadrature points
934 auto& xQuad = dunavant::x5; // barycentrics [nQuad][3]
935 auto& wQuad = dunavant::w5; // weights[nQuad]
936
937 // Allocate per-triangle, per-quad-point accumulators
938 std::vector<std::vector<cvec>> Etot(Ntri, std::vector<cvec>(nQuad, cvec(0, 0, 0))),
939 Htot(Ntri, std::vector<cvec>(nQuad, cvec(0, 0, 0)));
940
941 int offset = solVector->shape()(0) / 2; // offset for β coefficients
942
943 // Fill E, H normal and tangential components at each sample point
944 for (RWGFun& rwg : rwgFuns) {
945 // find which triangle index
946 Triangle* T = rwg.TrianglePtr();
947 size_t triIndex = std::distance(vTri.begin(),
948 std::find(vTri.begin(), vTri.end(), T));
949 rvec normal = vNormals[triIndex];
950
951 // material parameters (step off interface if needed)
952 rvec ctr = T->Center();
953 bool onInt = false;
954 for (double z0 : zValsInterfaces)
955 if (std::abs( ctr[2] - z0 ) < 1e-6) { onInt = true; break; }
956
957 // element local material parameters
958 dcmplx epsLoc = onInt ? Epsilon(ctr + 1e-1 * normal) : Epsilon(ctr);
959 dcmplx muLoc = onInt ? Mu(ctr + 1e-1 * normal) : Mu(ctr);
960
961 // RWG coefficients
962 dcmplx alpha = (*solVector)(rwg.EdgeIndex());
963 dcmplx beta = (*solVector)(rwg.EdgeIndex() + offset);
964 double divf = rwg.RWGPreFactor();
965
966 // triangle nodes
967 rvec r[3] = { T->Node(0), T->Node(1), T->Node(2) };
968
969 // loop quad points
970 for (int q = 0; q < nQuad; ++q) {
971 // physical sample point
972 rvec s = xQuad[q][0] * r[0] + xQuad[q][1] * r[1] + xQuad[q][2] * r[2];
973
974 // shape‐function at s
975 rvec fval = rwg.Evaluate(s);
976
977 // normal‐component (constant over tri)
978 cvec En_contrib = -I * alpha * divf * normal / (omega * epsLoc * EPS0);
979 cvec Hn_contrib = -I * beta * divf * normal / (omega * muLoc * MU0);
980
981 // tangential‐component
982 cvec Et_contrib = cross( (cvec)normal, (cvec)(beta * fval));
983 cvec Ht_contrib = -cross( (cvec)normal, (cvec)(alpha * fval));
984
985 // J,M currents have contributions from each RWG with opposite sign, thus -=
986 Etot[triIndex][q] -= En_contrib + Et_contrib;
987 Htot[triIndex][q] -= Hn_contrib + Ht_contrib;
988 }
989 }
990
991 // Quadrature - find the scattering cross section
992 double sigma = 0.0;
993 for (size_t t = 0; t < Ntri; ++t) {
994 rvec normal = vNormals[t];
995 double area = vTri[t]->Area();
996
997 // re-compute nodes for this triangle
998 rvec r[3] = { vTri[t]->Node(0), vTri[t]->Node(1), vTri[t]->Node(2) };
999
1000 for (int q = 0; q < nQuad; ++q) {
1001 // map barycentrics -> point
1002 rvec s = xQuad[q][0] * r[0] + xQuad[q][1] * r[1] + xQuad[q][2] * r[2];
1003
1004 cvec Einc = IncFieldE(s);
1005 cvec Hinc = IncFieldH(s);
1006 rvec Sinc = realVecL( cross(Einc, conjVecL(Hinc)) ) / 2.0;
1007
1008 cvec E = Etot[t][q];
1009 cvec H = Htot[t][q];
1010 rvec S = realVecL( cross(E, conjVecL(H)) ) / 2.0;
1011
1012 sigma -= wQuad[q] * area * dot(normal, S) / sqrt( dot( Sinc, Sinc ) );
1013 }
1014 }
1015 return sigma;
1016}
1017
1018double DomainLayered3D::extinctionCS(blitz::Array<dcmplx,1>* solVector)
1019{
1020 // Gather unique triangles & normals
1021 std::vector<Triangle*> vTri;
1022 std::vector<rvec> vNormals;
1023 vTri.reserve(rwgFuns.size());
1024 vNormals.reserve(rwgFuns.size());
1025
1026 for (RWGFun& rwg : rwgFuns) {
1027 Triangle* T = rwg.TrianglePtr();
1028 auto it = std::find(vTri.begin(), vTri.end(), T);
1029 if (it == vTri.end()) {
1030 vTri.push_back(T);
1031 vNormals.push_back(T->FBNormalVector(rwg.Side()));
1032 }
1033 }
1034
1035 size_t Ntri = vTri.size(); // number of unique triangles
1036
1037 // Quadrature rule on reference triangle
1038 int nQuad = dunavant::N5; // number of quadrature points
1039 auto& xQuad = dunavant::x5; // barycentrics [nQuad][3]
1040 auto& wQuad = dunavant::w5; // weights[nQuad]
1041
1042 // Allocate per-triangle, per-quad-point accumulators
1043 std::vector<std::vector<cvec>> Etot(Ntri, std::vector<cvec>(nQuad, cvec(0, 0, 0))),
1044 Htot(Ntri, std::vector<cvec>(nQuad, cvec(0, 0, 0)));
1045
1046 int offset = solVector->shape()(0) / 2; // offset for β coefficients
1047
1048 // Fill E, H normal and tangential components at each sample point
1049 for (RWGFun& rwg : rwgFuns) {
1050 // find which triangle index
1051 Triangle* T = rwg.TrianglePtr();
1052 size_t triIndex = std::distance(vTri.begin(),
1053 std::find(vTri.begin(), vTri.end(), T));
1054 rvec normal = vNormals[triIndex];
1055
1056 // material parameters (step off interface if needed)
1057 rvec ctr = T->Center();
1058 bool onInt = false;
1059 for (double z0 : zValsInterfaces)
1060 if (std::abs( ctr[2] - z0 ) < 1e-6) { onInt = true; break; }
1061
1062 // element local material parameters
1063 dcmplx epsLoc = onInt ? Epsilon(ctr + 1e-1 * normal) : Epsilon(ctr);
1064 dcmplx muLoc = onInt ? Mu(ctr + 1e-1 * normal) : Mu(ctr);
1065
1066 // RWG coefficients
1067 dcmplx alpha = (*solVector)(rwg.EdgeIndex());
1068 dcmplx beta = (*solVector)(rwg.EdgeIndex() + offset);
1069 double divf = rwg.RWGPreFactor();
1070
1071 // triangle nodes
1072 rvec r[3] = { T->Node(0), T->Node(1), T->Node(2) };
1073
1074 // loop quad points
1075 for (int q = 0; q < nQuad; ++q) {
1076 // physical sample point
1077 rvec s = xQuad[q][0] * r[0] + xQuad[q][1] * r[1] + xQuad[q][2] * r[2];
1078
1079 // shape‐function at s
1080 rvec fval = rwg.Evaluate(s);
1081
1082 // normal‐component (constant over tri)
1083 cvec En_contrib = -I * alpha * divf * normal / (omega * epsLoc * EPS0);
1084 cvec Hn_contrib = -I * beta * divf * normal / (omega * muLoc * MU0);
1085
1086 // tangential‐component
1087 cvec Et_contrib = cross( (cvec)normal, (cvec)(beta * fval));
1088 cvec Ht_contrib = -cross( (cvec)normal, (cvec)(alpha * fval));
1089
1090 // J,M currents have contributions from each RWG with opposite sign, thus -=
1091 Etot[triIndex][q] -= En_contrib + Et_contrib;
1092 Htot[triIndex][q] -= Hn_contrib + Ht_contrib;
1093 }
1094 }
1095
1096 // Quadrature - find the scattering cross section
1097 double sigma = 0.0;
1098 for (size_t t = 0; t < Ntri; ++t) {
1099 rvec normal = vNormals[t];
1100 double area = vTri[t]->Area();
1101
1102 // re-compute nodes for this triangle
1103 rvec r[3] = { vTri[t]->Node(0), vTri[t]->Node(1), vTri[t]->Node(2) };
1104
1105 for (int q = 0; q < nQuad; ++q) {
1106 // map barycentrics -> point
1107 rvec s = xQuad[q][0] * r[0] + xQuad[q][1] * r[1] + xQuad[q][2] * r[2];
1108
1109 cvec Einc = IncFieldE(s);
1110 cvec Hinc = IncFieldH(s);
1111 rvec Sinc = realVecL( cross(Einc, conjVecL(Hinc)) ) / 2.0;
1112
1113 cvec Escat = Etot[t][q] - Einc;
1114 cvec Hscat = Htot[t][q] - Hinc;
1115 rvec Sext = realVecL( cross(Einc, conjVecL(Hscat)) +
1116 cross(Escat, conjVecL(Hinc)) ) / 2.0;
1117
1118 sigma -= wQuad[q] * area * dot(normal, Sext) / sqrt( dot( Sinc, Sinc ) );
1119 }
1120 }
1121 return sigma;
1122}
1123
1124// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1125// Debugging and testing
1126// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
1127void DomainLayered3D::test_slice()
1128{
1129 std::string filename = "positions.txt";
1130 std::vector<rvec> points = readPositionsFromFile(filename);
1131
1132 // Example usage: Single set of positions
1133 auto groups1 = slice(points);
1134 std::cout << std::fixed << std::setprecision(2); // Set precision to 2 digits
1135 std::cout << "\n" << "----------------------------------------------------------------------\n";
1136 std::cout << "\n" << " This is the tabulation slice calculation test:\n";
1137 std::cout << "\n" << "----------------------------------------------------------------------\n";
1138 std::cout << "Single set of positions:\n";
1139 for (const auto& group : groups1) {
1140 std::cout << "Layer " << group.i1 << ": ";
1141 for (const auto& pos : group.pos1) {
1142 std::cout << "(" << pos[0] << ", " << pos[1] << ", " << pos[2] << "),\n";
1143 }
1144 std::cout << "\n";
1145 }
1146
1147 // Example usage: Two sets of positions
1148 auto groups2 = slice(points, &points);
1149 std::cout << "\nTwo sets of positions:\n";
1150 for (const auto& group : groups2) {
1151 std::cout << "Layer pair (" << group.i1 << ", " << group.i2 << "):\n";
1152 std::cout << "--Positions from set 1: ";
1153 std::cout << group.pos1.size() << "\n";
1154 std::cout << "--Indices from set 1: ";
1155 std::cout << group.ind1.size() << "\n";
1156 std::cout << "\n" << "--Positions from set 2: ";
1157 std::cout << group.pos2.size() << "\n";
1158 std::cout << "--Indices from set 2: ";
1159 std::cout << group.ind2.size() << "\n";
1160 std::cout << "\n\n";
1161 }
1162}
1163
1164void DomainLayered3D::test_range()
1165{
1166 std::string filename = "positions.txt";
1167 std::vector<rvec> points = readPositionsFromFile(filename);
1168
1169 auto groups1 = slice(points, &points);
1170 std::vector<Range> ranges;
1171 std::cout << std::fixed << std::setprecision(6); // Set precision to 6 digits
1172 std::cout << "\n" << "----------------------------------------------------------------------\n";
1173 std::cout << "\n" << " This is the tabulation range calculation test:\n";
1174 std::cout << "\n" << "----------------------------------------------------------------------\n";
1175 for (const auto& pt : groups1) {
1176 Range range = calculateRange(pt);
1177 ranges.push_back(range);
1178 std::cout << "Layer pair (" << range.i1 << ", " << range.i2 << "): ";
1179 std::cout << "Radial range: [" << range.r[0] << ", " << range.r[1] << "], ";
1180 std::cout << "Z1 range: [" << range.z1[0] << ", " << range.z1[1] << "], ";
1181 std::cout << "Z2 range: [" << range.z2[0] << ", " << range.z2[1] << "]\n";
1182 }
1183 std::cout << "\n";
1184}
1185
1186void DomainLayered3D::test_grid()
1187{
1188 std::string filename = "positions.txt";
1189 std::vector<rvec> points = readPositionsFromFile(filename);
1190
1191 auto groups1 = slice(points, &points);
1192 std::vector<Grid> grids = computeGrid(groups1, 5, 5);
1193 std::cout << std::fixed << std::setprecision(5); // Set precision to 5 digits
1194 std::cout << "\n" << "----------------------------------------------------------------------\n";
1195 std::cout << "\n" << " This is the tabulation grid calculation test:\n";
1196 std::cout << "\n" << "----------------------------------------------------------------------\n";
1197 // Print grids
1198 for (size_t i = 0; i < grids.size(); ++i) {
1199 std::cout << "Grid " << i + 1 << ":\n";
1200 std::cout << " r grid: ";
1201 for (const auto& r : grids[i].r) {
1202 std::cout << r << " ";
1203 }
1204 std::cout << "\n Z1 grid: ";
1205 for (const auto& z1 : grids[i].z1) {
1206 std::cout << z1 << " ";
1207 }
1208 if (!grids[i].z2.empty()) {
1209 std::cout << "\n Z2 grid: ";
1210 for (const auto& z2 : grids[i].z2) {
1211 std::cout << z2 << " ";
1212 }
1213 }
1214 std::cout << "\n\n";
1215 }
1216 std::cout << "\n";
1217}
1218
1219void DomainLayered3D::dumpField(const std::string& fieldName,
1220 const blitz::TinyVector<std::complex<double>, 3>& vec) {
1221 static std::ofstream eFile("Efield.txt");
1222 static std::ofstream hFile("Hfield.txt");
1223
1224 std::ofstream* out = nullptr;
1225 if (fieldName == "Efield") {
1226 out = &eFile;
1227 } else if (fieldName == "Hfield") {
1228 out = &hFile;
1229 } else {
1230 throw std::runtime_error("Unsupported field name: " + fieldName);
1231 }
1232
1233 *out << std::fixed << std::setprecision(6);
1234 for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {
1235 const auto& c = vec(i);
1236 *out << c.real();
1237 if (c.imag() >= 0) *out << " + ";
1238 else *out << " - ";
1239 *out << std::abs(c.imag()) << "i";
1240 if (i < 2) *out << " ";
1241 }
1242 *out << "; ";
1243}
1244
1254int DomainLayered3D::ClearIncidentFields() {
1255 Domain::ClearIncidentFields();
1256 if (grnFunLayeredFields) {
1257 delete grnFunLayeredFields;
1258 grnFunLayeredFields = nullptr;
1259 }
1260 return 0;
1261}
